_comment: Per-field descriptions sent in the JSON Schema's `description` property. Edit any value to refine. Set value to '' (empty string) to drop the description for that field. Keys must match field_key exactly.
checkbox_need_assistance_yes: Section 1, Question 1: 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — return 'selected' if the YES box is checked.
checkbox_need_assistance_no: Section 1, Question 1: 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — return 'selected' if the NO box is checked.
checkbox_family_assets_yes: Section 1, Question 2: 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — return 'selected' if the YES box is checked.
checkbox_family_assets_no: Section 1, Question 2: 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — return 'selected' if the NO box is checked.
checkbox_shelter_yes: Section 1, Question 3: 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — return 'selected' if YES is checked.
checkbox_shelter_no: Section 1, Question 3: 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — return 'selected' if NO is checked.
checkbox_dependants_yes: Section 1, Question 4: 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — return 'selected' if YES is checked.
checkbox_dependants_no: Section 1, Question 4: 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — return 'selected' if NO is checked.
checkbox_employment_changes_yes: Section 1, Question 5 (APPLICANT column, left): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
checkbox_employment_changes_no: Section 1, Question 5 (APPLICANT column, left): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 5 (SPOUSE column, right): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 5 (SPOUSE column, right): 'Any employment changes?' — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
checkbox_school_yes: Section 1, Question 6 (APPLICANT column): 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
checkbox_school_no: Section 1, Question 6 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
checkbox_school_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 6 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
checkbox_school_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 6 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
checkbox_work_yes: Section 1, Question 7 (APPLICANT column): 'Are you looking for work?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
checkbox_work_no: Section 1, Question 7 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
checkbox_work_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 7 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
checkbox_work_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 7 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
checkbox_moved_yes: Section 1, Question 8 (APPLICANT column): 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
checkbox_moved_no: Section 1, Question 8 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
checkbox_moved_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 8 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
checkbox_moved_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 8 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
checkbox_warrant_yes: Section 1, Question 9 (APPLICANT column): 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — return 'selected' if Applicant's YES is checked.
checkbox_warrant_no: Section 1, Question 9 (APPLICANT column): same question — return 'selected' if Applicant's NO is checked.
checkbox_warrant_spouse_yes: Section 1, Question 9 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's YES is checked.
checkbox_warrant_spouse_no: Section 1, Question 9 (SPOUSE column): same question — return 'selected' if Spouse's NO is checked.
explain_changes: Free-text paragraph immediately below 'Please explain all changes including income and submit proof:'. Capture the entire handwritten/typed paragraph verbatim. Empty string if blank.
signature: APPLICANT's signature (cursive mark or initials) in the 'Applicant Signature' box at the bottom of the form. Distinct from the printed name. Empty string if blank.
spouse_signature: SPOUSE's signature (cursive mark or initials) in the 'Spouse Signature' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
date: APPLICANT's signature date in the box labeled 'Date (yyyy-mmm-dd)' next to the Applicant Signature. Return as YYYY-MM-DD.
spouse_date: SPOUSE's signature date in the box labeled 'Date (yyyy-mmm-dd)' next to the Spouse Signature. Return as YYYY-MM-DD.
name: APPLICANT's printed full name in the 'Applicant Print Name' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
spouse_name: SPOUSE's printed full name in the 'Spouse Print Name' box at the bottom of the form. Empty string if blank.
phone: APPLICANT's telephone number in the 'Applicant Telephone' box. Preserve formatting (parens, hyphens) as written. Empty string if blank.
spouse_phone: SPOUSE's telephone number in the 'Spouse Telephone' box. Preserve formatting. Empty string if blank.
sin: APPLICANT's Social Insurance Number, 9 digits. Strip any spaces or hyphens. Empty string if blank.
spouse_sin: SPOUSE's Social Insurance Number, 9 digits. Strip any spaces or hyphens. Empty string if blank.
applicant_net_employment_income: Section 2 income table, row 'Net Employment Income', APPLICANT column (left). Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_employment_insurance: Section 2 income table, row 'Employment Insurance', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_spousal_support_alimony: Section 2 income table, row 'Spousal Support / Alimony', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_child_support: Section 2 income table, row 'Child Support', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_workbc_financial_support: Section 2 income table, row 'WorkBC Financial Support', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_student_funding_loans_bursarie: Section 2, row 'Student Funding (eg: Loans, Bursaries)', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_rental_income: Section 2, row 'Rental Income', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
applicant_room_board_income: Section 2, row 'Room / Board Income', APPLICANT column. Numeric; return null if the cell is blank, the number 0 only if the cell explicitly shows 0 or $0, otherwise the dollar amount as a number.
